sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_connections (id VARCHAR(50), conn_id VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO test_connections (id, conn_id) VALUES ('1', connection_id());
UPDATE test_connections SET conn_id = connection_id() WHERE id = '1';
SELECT id, conn_id FROM test_connections WHERE conn_id = connection_id();
DELETE FROM test_connections WHERE conn_id = connection_id();
